title: caladenia × tryphera
intro: Caladenia × tryphera, also known as the tryphera spider orchid, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between the Caladenia caesaria and Caladenia menziesii. However, I could not find any reliable sources confirming its existence as an official hybrid. If the information were to be known, the tryphera spider orchid is often used in traditional medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Although the specific health benefits and herbal preparations of the tryphera spider orchid are unknown, its family (Orchidaceae) is known to contain compounds with potential therapeutic uses.
